prompt: Create a dynamic square-format anime ink illustration of a stylish androgynous young man, rebellious modern fantasy streetwear swordsman, shown from the waist up on a clean white background. He has messy tousled black hair with subtle brown highlights, many ear piercings, dangling chain earrings, layered necklaces, rings, bracelets, blue-painted fingernails, and ornate talisman-like accessories. His face is intentionally obscured by a centered opaque square censor block with a soft vertical gray-to-warm-taupe gradient, covering most facial features while leaving hair, ear, neck, and clothing visible. Pose him in a confident three-quarter view, leaning slightly back, with one hand extended toward the viewer in dramatic foreshortening as if beckoning or casting a spell. Dress him in a loose layered kimono-jacket outfit: white outer robe with black trim, black inner garments, blue accents, straps, cords, chains, metal charms, beads, and small skull-like ornaments. Use a high-detail Japanese manga concept-art style with expressive brush lines, splattered ink, scratchy crosshatching, flowing fabric folds, and energetic motion strokes. The palette should be mostly black, white, beige, and cobalt blue, with scattered black and blue ink splashes across the figure and background. Add exactly three visible graphic calligraphy/graffiti elements around him: a large black kanji-like symbol on the left, a blue hand-drawn crown with small marks on the upper right, and a small blue rectangular stamp seal near the lower left. Keep the composition dramatic, chaotic, fashionable, and highly detailed, with no photorealism, no extra characters, and no readable English text.
